subcodes.first_line: O Prince, the Pure God hath been thy friend, that thou hast found entry to this Court and to the celestial Portals [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شهریار یزدان پاک یار بوده که باین دربار بار یافتی و بایوان جهانبان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @mystical themes, @predictions and prophecies, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @living waters; water of life
